name: KADANT INC
business: Kadant Inc. is a global supplier of technologies and engineered systems that drive Sustainable Industrial Processing, serving process industries such as paper, packaging, tissue, wood products, mining, metals, food processing, and recycling and waste management. The company operates in three segments: Flow Control, Industrial Processing, and Material Handling.
sellsTo: global and regional industrial manufacturers and distributors
customers in North America, Europe, and China

exposures.sentence: We provide industrial automation, process technology, and project management services to help industrial companies digitally transform their operations.

Through our Material Handling segment, we provide products and engineered systems used to handle bulk and discrete materials for secondary processing or transport in the aggregates, mining, food, and waste management industries, among others.
We manufacture debarkers, stranders and related equipment used in the production of lumber and OSB.

We manufacture and sell biodegradable, absorbent granules derived from papermaking by-products. These materials are primarily used as carriers in agricultural, home lawn and garden, professional lawn, turf and ornamental applications, and for oil and grease absorption.

Through our Flow Control segment, we provide custom-engineered products, systems, and technologies that control the flow of fluids used in industrial and commercial applications to keep critical processes running efficiently in the packaging, paper and tissue, food, energy, defense and numerous other industrial sectors.
We develop, manufacture, and market individual components and equipment for baling recyclable and waste materials to prepare them for secondary processing, transport, or storage.

We have a long and well-established history of developing, manufacturing, and servicing a range of products and equipment used in process industries such as paper, packaging, and tissue; wood products; mining; metals; food processing; and recycling and waste management, among others.

Our systems have been and may in the future be compromised by malware (including ransomware), denial-of-service attacks, cyberattacks, and other events, ranging from widespread, non-targeted, global cyber threats to targeted advanced persistent threats.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of Babbini S.p.A and G.P.S. Engineering S.r.l
catalysts.sentence: On July 9, 2025, we acquired all the outstanding equity securities of Babbini S.p.A and G.P.S. Engineering S.r.l (collectively, Babbini), two Italy-based companies specializing in industrial dewatering and engineered power transmission solutions, for approximately $16.5 million, net of cash acquired.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of Clyde Industries Holdings, Inc. and subsidiaries
catalysts.sentence: On October 7, 2025, we acquired all the outstanding equity securities of Clyde Industries Holdings, Inc. and its subsidiaries (collectively, Clyde Industries), a manufacturer of highly engineered boiler efficiency and cleaning system technologies for $173.7 million, net of cash acquired.

catalysts.event: Definitive agreement to acquire voestalpine B HLER Profil
catalysts.sentence: On January 29, 2026, we entered into a definitive agreement to acquire the shares of voestalpine B HLER Profil GmbH & Co KG and voestalpine B HLER Profil VerwaltungsGmbH (collectively, voestalpine B HLER Profil), a global supplier of tailor-made special profiles with complex geometries and high-performance industrial knives for approximately 157.0 million euros in cash, subject to certain customary adjustments.

catalysts.event: Board authorization of share repurchase program
catalysts.sentence: On May 15, 2025, our board of directors approved the repurchase of up to $50.0 million of our equity securities during the period from May 15, 2025 to May 15, 2026.
On November 13, 2025, we declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.34 per share totaling $4.0 million that was paid on February 5, 2026.
We plan to make capital expenditures of approximately $23.0 to $27.0 million during 2026 for property, plant, and equipment.

catalysts.event: Backlog shipment expectation for fiscal 2025 end
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate that the majority of the backlog at our fiscal year-end 2025 will be shipped within 12 months.

catalysts.event: Anticipated higher bookings in 2026, particularly in Industrial Processing
catalysts.sentence: Overall, we anticipate higher bookings in 2026 compared to 2025, especially in our Industrial Processing segment where customer delays associated with pending orders from 2025 have resulted in a number of capital orders in the pipeline.
